title: The Tip Screen Is Engineered to Drain $1,040 From You
hook: That little screen spinning around at the coffee counter isn't asking for your generosity — it's a psychological weapon designed to extract money you never planned to give.
angle: Tip screens use default anchoring, social pressure timers, and option architecture to maximize extraction — and tip spending is up 53% since 2019
audience: Anyone who pays for food or services and has felt pressured by a tip screen
key_numbers: +23% more tips triggered by pre-selected default buttons
$360/year lost to the 8-second 'pause of shame' social pressure window
